nodes.name: Sierra Madre ground warbler
nodes.summary: Sierra Madre ground warbler（Sierra Madre ground warbler，学名 Robsonius thompsoni），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park
nodes.summary: Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联29种鸟类，包括Rufous coucal、Philippine drongo-cuckoo、Philippine hawk-cuckoo等29种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 原始森林
nodes.summary: 原始森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联240种鸟类，包括黑額鳴冠雉、Singing quail、Stripe-faced wood quail等240种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 菲律宾
nodes.summary: 菲律宾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联131种鸟类，包括细斑树鸭、青头潜鸭、菲律宾冢雉等131种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 呂宋
nodes.summary: 呂宋是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联13种鸟类，包括Rufous coucal、Flame-breasted fruit dove、菲律賓三趾翠鳥等13种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is endemic to the island of Luzon in the Philippines, where it is found in the northeastern and eastern foothills of the Sierra Madre

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is endemic to the island of Luzon in the Philippines, where it is found in the northeastern and eastern foothills of the Sierra Madre

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in lowland moist and low montane dipterocarp forest in primary forest, secondary forest and forest edge up to 1,300 m

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in lowland moist and low montane dipterocarp forest in primary forest, secondary forest and forest edge up to 1,300 m

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in two protected areas in the Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park and the Aurora Memorial National Park; however, like most areas in the Philippines protection is lax

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its habitat is in tropical moist lowland and the lower reaches of tropical montane forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It was formerly conspecific and forms a species complex with the Cordillera ground warbler and Bicol ground warbler, which are some of most elusive birds in the country due to their extremely shy nature.While not officially threatened, its population is said to be declining due to habitat destruction through deforestation

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It was formerly conspecific and forms a species complex with the Cordillera ground warbler and Bicol ground warbler, which are some of most elusive birds in the country due to their extremely shy nature.While not officially threatened, its population is said to be declining due to habitat destruction through deforestation
